use_cases: Submitting content changes to a CMS or publishing platform
Triggering async operations like form submission or API calls
Providing primary call-to-action in modal dialogs
Enabling user actions in dashboard interfaces
Acting as confirmation trigger for workflow operations
ai_summary: A versatile publish button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority for flexible variant styling. Features standard button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon), with proper accessibility support through focus-visible ring states and disabled states. Suitable for SaaS applications, content management systems, and any platform requiring publish or submit functionality.
